task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL like 's3://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/key'. The function should return just the region code (e.g., 'us-west-2').

Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'. The policy should include the appropriate actions (s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket) and resources.
Write a regular expression that validates AWS access key IDs. AWS access key IDs start with 'AKIA', followed by 16 uppercase alphanumeric characters (total length of 20 characters).
